mapper.select: select count(*) from members

select member_id, name, nickname, email, profile_image_url, upper(status) as status, created_at, role, last_login_at, suspended_until, coalesce(suspension_count, 0) as suspension_count, coalesce(warning_count, 0) as warning_count, 0 as report_count, 0 as post_count, 0 as comment_count from members order by created_at desc

select p.post_id, p.title, p.content, p.visibility, p.deleted_yn, p.emotion_id, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at, p.member_id, m.name as author_name, m.nickname as author_nickname, m.profile_image_url as author_profile_image_url, coalesce(( select count(*) from comment_tbl c where c.post_id = p.post_id and c.deleted_yn = 'N' ), 0) as comment_count, coalesce(( select count(*) from post_hashtag ph where ph.post_id = p.post_id ), 0) as hashtag_count, coalesce(( select group_concat(concat('#', h.hashtag) order by h.hashtag separator ' ') from post_hashtag ph join hashtag h on h.hashtag_id = ph.hashtag_id where ph.post_id = p.post_id ), '') as tags from post_tbl p left join members m on m.member_id = p.member_id order by p.created_at desc limit 500

select c.comment_id, c.post_id, coalesce(p.title, '제목 없음') as post_title, c.content, c.deleted_yn, date_format(c.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at, c.member_id, m.name as author_name, m.nickname as author_nickname, m.profile_image_url as author_profile_image_url, c.parent_id, case when c.deleted_yn = 'Y' then 'DELETED' when latest_log.action_type = 'HIDE' then 'HIDDEN' else 'PUBLIC' end as moderation_status from comment_tbl c left join post_tbl p on p.post_id = c.post_id left join members m on m.member_id = c.member_id left join ( select log.target_id, log.action_type from admin_action_logs log inner join ( select target_id, max(log_id) as latest_log_id from admin_action_logs where target_type = 'COMMENT' and action_type in ('HIDE', 'RESTORE') group by target_id ) latest on latest.latest_log_id = log.log_id ) latest_log on latest_log.target_id = c.comment_id order by c.created_at desc limit 500

select c.comment_id, c.post_id, coalesce(p.title, '제목 없음') as post_title, c.content, c.deleted_yn, date_format(c.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at, c.member_id, m.name as author_name, m.nickname as author_nickname, c.parent_id, case when c.deleted_yn = 'Y' then 'DELETED' when latest_log.action_type = 'HIDE' then 'HIDDEN' else 'PUBLIC' end as moderation_status from comment_tbl c left join post_tbl p on p.post_id = c.post_id left join members m on m.member_id = c.member_id left join ( select log.target_id, log.action_type from admin_action_logs log inner join ( select target_id, max(log_id) as latest_log_id from admin_action_logs where target_type = 'COMMENT' and action_type in ('HIDE', 'RESTORE') group by target_id ) latest on latest.latest_log_id = log.log_id ) latest_log on latest_log.target_id = c.comment_id where c.comment_id = #{commentId} limit 1

select h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag, coalesce(h.use_count, 0) as use_count, count(ph.post_hashtag_id) as post_count, date_format(max(p.created_at), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as latest_post_created_at, case when latest_log.action_type = 'DELETE' then 'DELETED' when latest_log.action_type = 'HIDE' then 'HIDDEN' else 'PUBLIC' end as moderation_status from hashtag h left join post_hashtag ph on ph.hashtag_id = h.hashtag_id left join post_tbl p on p.post_id = ph.post_id left join ( select log.target_id, log.action_type from admin_action_logs log inner join ( select target_id, max(log_id) as latest_log_id from admin_action_logs where target_type = 'HASHTAG' and action_type in ('HIDE', 'DELETE', 'RESTORE') group by target_id ) latest on latest.latest_log_id = log.log_id ) latest_log on latest_log.target_id = h.hashtag_id group by h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag, h.use_count, latest_log.action_type order by post_count desc, h.hashtag asc limit 500

select h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag, coalesce(h.use_count, 0) as use_count, count(ph.post_hashtag_id) as post_count, date_format(max(p.created_at), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as latest_post_created_at, case when latest_log.action_type = 'DELETE' then 'DELETED' when latest_log.action_type = 'HIDE' then 'HIDDEN' else 'PUBLIC' end as moderation_status from hashtag h left join post_hashtag ph on ph.hashtag_id = h.hashtag_id left join post_tbl p on p.post_id = ph.post_id left join ( select log.target_id, log.action_type from admin_action_logs log inner join ( select target_id, max(log_id) as latest_log_id from admin_action_logs where target_type = 'HASHTAG' and action_type in ('HIDE', 'DELETE', 'RESTORE') group by target_id ) latest on latest.latest_log_id = log.log_id ) latest_log on latest_log.target_id = h.hashtag_id where h.hashtag_id = #{hashtagId} group by h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag, h.use_count, latest_log.action_type limit 1

select p.post_id, p.title, p.content, p.visibility, p.deleted_yn, p.emotion_id, date_format(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at, p.member_id, m.name as author_name, m.nickname as author_nickname, coalesce(( select count(*) from comment_tbl c where c.post_id = p.post_id and c.deleted_yn = 'N' ), 0) as comment_count, coalesce(( select count(*) from post_hashtag ph where ph.post_id = p.post_id ), 0) as hashtag_count, coalesce(( select group_concat(concat('#', h.hashtag) order by h.hashtag separator ' ') from post_hashtag ph join hashtag h on h.hashtag_id = ph.hashtag_id where ph.post_id = p.post_id ), '') as tags from post_tbl p left join members m on m.member_id = p.member_id where p.post_id = #{postId} limit 1
mapper.update: update post_tbl set visibility = 'PRIVATE', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
update post_tbl set visibility = 'PUBLIC', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
update post_tbl set deleted_yn = 'Y', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
update post_tbl set deleted_yn = 'N', visibility = 'PUBLIC', updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where post_id = #{postId} and deleted_yn = 'Y'
update comment_tbl set deleted_yn = 'Y' where comment_id = #{commentId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
update comment_tbl set deleted_yn = 'N' where comment_id = #{commentId} and deleted_yn = 'Y'
mapper.select: select count(*) as total_member_count, coalesce(sum(case when role != 'SUPER_ADMIN' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as normal_member_count, coalesce(sum(case when role = 'SUPER_ADMIN' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as admin_member_count, coalesce(sum(case when status = 'SUSPENDED' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as suspended_member_count from members
select member_id, name, nickname, email, upper(status) as status, role, created_at, null as action_type, null as action_detail from members order by created_at desc limit 1

select coalesce(target.member_id, log.target_id) as member_id, target.name, target.nickname, target.email, upper(target.status) as status, target.role, log.created_at, log.action_type, log.action_detail from admin_action_logs log left join members target on target.member_id = log.target_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type = 'SUSPEND' order by log.created_at desc, log.log_id desc limit 1

select log.log_id, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_type, log.target_type, log.target_id, target_member.name as target_name, target_member.nickname as target_nickname, target_member.email as target_email, log.created_at, log.action_detail from admin_action_logs log left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type in ('UPDATE_ADMIN_ROLE', 'SUSPEND', 'RESTORE') order by log.created_at desc, log.log_id desc limit 10

select log.log_id, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_type, log.target_type, log.target_id, target_member.name as target_name, target_member.nickname as target_nickname, target_member.email as target_email, log.created_at, log.action_detail from admin_action_logs log left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type in ('UPDATE_ADMIN_ROLE', 'SUSPEND', 'RESTORE') order by log.created_at desc, log.log_id desc

select log.log_id, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_type, log.target_type, log.target_id, target_member.name as target_name, target_member.nickname as target_nickname, target_member.email as target_email, log.created_at, log.action_detail from admin_action_logs log left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.target_id = #{memberId} and log.action_type in ('SUSPEND', 'RESTORE') order by log.created_at desc, log.log_id desc limit 50

select member_id, email, name, nickname, phone, email_verified, phone_verified, role, upper(status) as status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, suspended_until, coalesce(suspension_count, 0) as suspension_count, coalesce(warning_count, 0) as warning_count from members where member_id = #{memberId} limit 1

select member_id, name, nickname, email, upper(status) as status, created_at, role, last_login_at, suspended_until, coalesce(suspension_count, 0) as suspension_count, coalesce(warning_count, 0) as warning_count, 0 as report_count, 0 as post_count, 0 as comment_count from members where status = 'ACTIVE' and role in ('USER', 'MEMBER', 'SUPER_ADMIN') and ( #{keyword} = '' or
name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
email like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
) order by created_at desc limit 100
mapper.update: update members set role = #{role}, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 'ACTIVE' and role in ('USER', 'MEMBER', 'SUPER_ADMIN')

update members set status = 'SUSPENDED', suspended_until = #{suspendedUntil}, suspension_count = coalesce(suspension_count, 0) + 1, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_at is null
update members set warning_count = coalesce(warning_count, 0) + 1, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_at is null
update members set status = 'ACTIVE', suspended_until = null, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 'SUSPENDED' and deleted_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into admin_action_logs ( admin_id, action_type, target_type, target_id, created_at, action_detail ) values ( #{adminId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), #{actionDetail} )
mapper.select: select count(*) as total_count, sum(case when r.report_status = 'DONE' then 1 else 0 end) as done_count, sum(case when r.report_status = 'DONE' then 0 else 1 end) as open_count from report r where r.created_at >= #{startDate} and r.created_at < date_add(#{endDate}, interval 1 day)

select * from ( select r.report_id, case when r.post_id is not null then 'POST' else 'COMMENT' end as target_type, r.reporter_member_id, reporter.name as reporter_name, reporter.nickname as reporter_nickname, reporter.email as reporter_email, case when r.post_id is not null then post_author.member_id else comment_author.member_id end as target_member_id, case when r.post_id is not null then post_author.name else comment_author.name end as target_member_name, case when r.post_id is not null then post_author.nickname else comment_author.nickname end as target_member_nickname, case when r.post_id is not null then post_author.email else comment_author.email end as target_member_email, case when r.post_id is not null then post_author.created_at else comment_author.created_at end as target_member_created_at, ( select count(*) from post_tbl target_post_count where target_post_count.member_id = case when r.post_id is not null then post_author.member_id else comment_author.member_id end and coalesce(target_post_count.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N' ) as target_post_count, ( select count(*) from comment_tbl target_comment_count where target_comment_count.member_id = case when r.post_id is not null then post_author.member_id else comment_author.member_id end and coalesce(target_comment_count.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N' ) as target_comment_count, ( select count(*) from post_like target_like_count where target_like_count.member_id = case when r.post_id is not null then post_author.member_id else comment_author.member_id end ) as target_like_count, ( select count(*) from report target_report left join post_tbl reported_post on reported_post.post_id = target_report.post_id left join comment_tbl reported_comment on reported_comment.comment_id = target_report.comment_id where coalesce(reported_post.member_id, reported_comment.member_id) = case when r.post_id is not null then post_author.member_id else comment_author.member_id end ) as target_report_count, coalesce( case when r.post_id is not null then post_author.warning_count else comment_author.warning_count end, 0 ) as target_warning_count, ( select count(*) from admin_action_logs target_suspend_log where target_suspend_log.target_type = 'USER' and target_suspend_log.action_type = 'SUSPEND' and target_suspend_log.target_id = case when r.post_id is not null then post_author.member_id else comment_author.member_id end ) as target_suspend_count, r.post_id, r.comment_id, coalesce(post_target.title, comment_post.title) as post_title, ( select group_concat(concat('#', h.hashtag) order by h.hashtag separator ' ') from post_hashtag ph join hashtag h on h.hashtag_id = ph.hashtag_id where ph.post_id = coalesce(post_target.post_id, comment_post.post_id) ) as post_tags, case when r.post_id is not null then post_target.content else comment_target.content end as target_content, comment_target.content as comment_content, r.reason, r.report_status, r.process_result, r.handled_memo, r.handled_by_member_id, handled_member.name as handled_by_member_name, r.reviewed_at, r.handled_at, r.created_at, ( select count(*) from report same_report where ( r.post_id is not null and same_report.post_id = r.post_id ) or ( r.comment_id is not null and same_report.comment_id = r.comment_id ) ) as same_target_report_count, ( select count(distinct same_report.reporter_member_id) from report same_report where ( r.post_id is not null and same_report.post_id = r.post_id ) or ( r.comment_id is not null and same_report.comment_id = r.comment_id ) ) as same_target_reporter_count from report r left join members reporter on reporter.member_id = r.reporter_member_id left join post_tbl post_target on post_target.post_id = r.post_id left join members post_author on post_author.member_id = post_target.member_id left join comment_tbl comment_target on comment_target.comment_id = r.comment_id left join post_tbl comment_post on comment_post.post_id = comment_target.post_id left join members comment_author on comment_author.member_id = comment_target.member_id left join members handled_member on handled_member.member_id = r.handled_by_member_id where r.report_id = #{reportId} ) report_detail

select reporter.member_id, reporter.name, reporter.nickname, reporter.email, count(*) as report_count, date_format(min(same_report.created_at), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as first_reported_at, date_format(max(same_report.created_at), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as latest_reported_at from report base_report join report same_report on ( base_report.post_id is not null and same_report.post_id = base_report.post_id ) or ( base_report.comment_id is not null and same_report.comment_id = base_report.comment_id ) left join members reporter on reporter.member_id = same_report.reporter_member_id where base_report.report_id = #{reportId} group by reporter.member_id, reporter.name, reporter.nickname, reporter.email order by max(same_report.created_at) desc, max(same_report.report_id) desc
mapper.update: update report set report_status = 'REVIEWING', reviewed_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where report_id = #{reportId} and report_status in ('PENDING', 'REVIEWING')

update report set report_status = 'DONE', process_result = #{processResult}, handled_memo = #{handledMemo}, handled_by_member_id = #{adminId}, handled_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where report_id = #{reportId} and report_status in ('PENDING', 'REVIEWING')
mapper.select: select (select count(*) from members) as total_member_count, (select count(*) from members where created_at >= date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')) and created_at < date_add(date(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')), interval 1 day)) as today_new_member_count, (select count(*) from post_tbl where deleted_yn = 'N') as post_count, (select count(*) from report where report_status in ('PENDING', 'REVIEWING')) as pending_report_count

select p.emotion_id, count(*) as activity_count from post_tbl p where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.emotion_id is not null and p.created_at >= #{startDate} and p.created_at < date_add(#{endDate}, interval 1 day) group by p.emotion_id order by p.emotion_id

choose.when: with recursive day_numbers(day_index) as ( select 0 union all select day_index + 1 from day_numbers where day_index < 6 ), day_slots as ( select day_index, date_add(#{startDate}, interval day_index day) as slot_date from day_numbers d ) select elt(s.day_index + 1, '월', '화', '수', '목', '금', '토', '일') as label, cast(count(distinct l.member_id) as decimal(10, 1)) as active_user_count from day_slots s left join login_audit_logs l on l.success = 1 and l.member_id is not null and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') >= s.slot_date and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') < date_add(s.slot_date, interval 1 day) group by s.day_index order by s.day_index

with recursive month_numbers(month_index) as ( select 1 union all select month_index + 1 from month_numbers where month_index < 12 ), month_slots as ( select month_index, str_to_date(concat(year(#{startDate}), '-', lpad(month_index, 2, '0'), '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') as month_start from month_numbers ) select concat(s.month_index, '월') as label, cast(count(distinct l.member_id) as decimal(10, 1)) as active_user_count from month_slots s left join login_audit_logs l on l.success = 1 and l.member_id is not null and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') >= s.month_start and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') < date_add(s.month_start, interval 1 month) group by s.month_index order by s.month_index
choose.otherwise: with recursive hour_numbers(hour_index) as ( select 0 union all select hour_index + 1 from hour_numbers where hour_index < 23 ) select concat(lpad(h.hour_index, 2, '0'), '시') as label, cast(count(distinct l.member_id) as decimal(10, 1)) as active_user_count from hour_numbers h left join login_audit_logs l on l.success = 1 and l.member_id is not null and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') >= date_add(#{startDate}, interval h.hour_index hour) and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') < date_add(#{startDate}, interval (h.hour_index + 1) hour) group by h.hour_index order by h.hour_index

mapper.select:
select * from ( select 'JOINED' as activity_type, m.member_id, m.name as member_name, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, null as admin_id, null as admin_name, null as admin_nickname, CHAR(54924, 50896, 32, 44032, 51077 USING utf8mb4) as activity_detail, m.created_at from members m where m.created_at is not null
union all
select 'DELETED' as activity_type, m.member_id, m.name as member_name, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, null as admin_id, null as admin_name, null as admin_nickname, CHAR(54924, 50896, 32, 53448, 53748 USING utf8mb4) as activity_detail, m.deleted_at as created_at from members m where m.deleted_at is not null
union all
select case when log.action_type = 'SUSPEND' then 'SUSPENDED' else 'RESTORED' end as activity_type, coalesce(target_member.member_id, log.target_id) as member_id, target_member.name as member_name, target_member.nickname as member_nickname, target_member.email as member_email, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_detail, log.created_at from admin_action_logs log left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type in ('SUSPEND', 'RESTORE')
union all
select 'ROLE_CHANGED' as activity_type, coalesce(target_member.member_id, log.target_id) as member_id, target_member.name as member_name, target_member.nickname as member_nickname, target_member.email as member_email, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_detail, log.created_at from admin_action_logs log left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type = 'UPDATE_ADMIN_ROLE'
union all
select case when log.action_type = 'CREATE' then 'NOTICE_CREATED' when log.action_type = 'UPDATE' then 'NOTICE_UPDATED' else 'NOTICE_DELETED' end as activity_type, log.admin_id as member_id, admin_member.name as member_name, admin_member.nickname as member_nickname, admin_member.email as member_email, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_detail, log.created_at from admin_action_logs log left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id where log.target_type = 'NOTICE' and log.action_type in ('CREATE', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE') ) recent_activity where created_at is not null order by created_at desc limit 10

select * from ( select 'JOINED' as activity_type, m.member_id, m.name as member_name, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, null as admin_id, null as admin_name, null as admin_nickname, CHAR(54924, 50896, 32, 44032, 51077 USING utf8mb4) as activity_detail, m.created_at from members m where m.created_at is not null
union all
select 'DELETED' as activity_type, m.member_id, m.name as member_name, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.email as member_email, null as admin_id, null as admin_name, null as admin_nickname, CHAR(54924, 50896, 32, 53448, 53748 USING utf8mb4) as activity_detail, m.deleted_at as created_at from members m where m.deleted_at is not null
union all
select case when log.action_type = 'SUSPEND' then 'SUSPENDED' else 'RESTORED' end as activity_type, coalesce(target_member.member_id, log.target_id) as member_id, target_member.name as member_name, target_member.nickname as member_nickname, target_member.email as member_email, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_detail, log.created_at from admin_action_logs log left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type in ('SUSPEND', 'RESTORE')
union all
select 'ROLE_CHANGED' as activity_type, coalesce(target_member.member_id, log.target_id) as member_id, target_member.name as member_name, target_member.nickname as member_nickname, target_member.email as member_email, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_detail, log.created_at from admin_action_logs log left join members target_member on target_member.member_id = log.target_id left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id where log.target_type = 'USER' and log.action_type = 'UPDATE_ADMIN_ROLE'
union all
select case when log.action_type = 'CREATE' then 'NOTICE_CREATED' when log.action_type = 'UPDATE' then 'NOTICE_UPDATED' else 'NOTICE_DELETED' end as activity_type, log.admin_id as member_id, admin_member.name as member_name, admin_member.nickname as member_nickname, admin_member.email as member_email, log.admin_id, admin_member.name as admin_name, admin_member.nickname as admin_nickname, log.action_detail, log.created_at from admin_action_logs log left join members admin_member on admin_member.member_id = log.admin_id where log.target_type = 'NOTICE' and log.action_type in ('CREATE', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE') ) recent_activity where created_at is not null order by created_at desc

select (select count(*) from members) as total_member_count, (select count(*) from members m where m.created_at is not null and m.created_at >= #{startDate} and m.created_at < date_add(#{endDate}, interval 1 day)) as new_member_count, (select count(distinct l.member_id) from login_audit_logs l where l.success = 1 and l.member_id is not null and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') >= #{startDate} and CONVERT_TZ(l.created_at, '+00:00', '+09:00') < date_add(#{endDate}, interval 1 day)) as active_user_count, (select count(*) from post_tbl p where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.created_at >= #{startDate} and p.created_at < date_add(#{endDate}, interval 1 day)) as post_count, (select count(*) from comment_tbl c join post_tbl p on p.post_id = c.post_id where c.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.deleted_yn = 'N' and c.created_at >= #{startDate} and c.created_at < date_add(#{endDate}, interval 1 day)) as comment_count, (select count(*) from user_post_like l join post_tbl p on p.post_id = l.post_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and l.created_at >= #{startDate} and l.created_at < date_add(#{endDate}, interval 1 day)) as empathy_count

choose.when: with recursive day_numbers(day_index) as ( select 0 union all select day_index + 1 from day_numbers where day_index < 6 ) select elt(d.day_index + 1, '월', '화', '수', '목', '금', '토', '일') as label, count(m.member_id) as value from day_numbers d left join members m on m.created_at >= date_add(#{startDate}, interval d.day_index day) and m.created_at < date_add(#{startDate}, interval (d.day_index + 1) day) group by d.day_index order by d.day_index

with recursive month_numbers(month_index) as ( select 1 union all select month_index + 1 from month_numbers where month_index < 12 ), month_slots as ( select month_index, str_to_date(concat(year(#{startDate}), '-', lpad(month_index, 2, '0'), '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') as month_start from month_numbers ) select concat(s.month_index, '월') as label, count(m.member_id) as value from month_slots s left join members m on m.created_at >= s.month_start and m.created_at < date_add(s.month_start, interval 1 month) group by s.month_index order by s.month_index
choose.otherwise: with recursive hour_numbers(hour_index) as ( select 0 union all select hour_index + 1 from hour_numbers where hour_index < 23 ) select concat(lpad(h.hour_index, 2, '0'), '시') as label, count(m.member_id) as value from hour_numbers h left join members m on m.created_at >= date_add(#{startDate}, interval h.hour_index hour) and m.created_at < date_add(#{startDate}, interval (h.hour_index + 1) hour) group by h.hour_index order by h.hour_index

mapper.select: select CHAR(44172, 49884, 44544 USING utf8mb4) as label, count(*) as value from post_tbl p where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.created_at >= #{startDate} and p.created_at < date_add(#{endDate}, interval 1 day) union all select CHAR(45843, 44544 USING utf8mb4) as label, count(*) as value from comment_tbl c join post_tbl p on p.post_id = c.post_id where c.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.deleted_yn = 'N' and c.created_at >= #{startDate} and c.created_at < date_add(#{endDate}, interval 1 day) union all select CHAR(44277, 44048 USING utf8mb4) as label, count(*) as value from user_post_like l join post_tbl p on p.post_id = l.post_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and l.created_at >= #{startDate} and l.created_at < date_add(#{endDate}, interval 1 day)
select member_id, name, nickname, phone from members where member_id = #{memberId} limit 1
mapper.update: update members set profile_image_url = null, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where upper(role) = 'SUPER_ADMIN' and profile_image_url is not null
update members set name = #{name}, nickname = #{nickname}, phone = #{phone}, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select:
select notice.notice_id, notice.title, notice.content, notice.notice_type, notice.created_by_admin_id, created_admin.name as created_by_admin_name, created_admin.nickname as created_by_admin_nickname, created_admin.email as created_by_admin_email, created_admin.name as admin_name, created_admin.nickname as admin_nickname, created_admin.email as admin_email, notice.updated_by_admin_id, notice.created_at, notice.updated_at, notice.deleted_at from notices_tbl notice left join members created_admin on created_admin.member_id = notice.created_by_admin_id
notice.deleted_at is null
notice.deleted_at is not null
order by notice.created_at desc, notice.notice_id desc limit 500

select notice.notice_id, notice.title, notice.content, notice.notice_type, notice.created_by_admin_id, created_admin.name as created_by_admin_name, created_admin.nickname as created_by_admin_nickname, created_admin.email as created_by_admin_email, created_admin.name as admin_name, created_admin.nickname as admin_nickname, created_admin.email as admin_email, notice.updated_by_admin_id, notice.created_at, notice.updated_at, notice.deleted_at from notices_tbl notice left join members created_admin on created_admin.member_id = notice.created_by_admin_id where notice.notice_id = #{noticeId} limit 1

select notice.notice_id, notice.title, notice.content, notice.notice_type, notice.created_by_admin_id, created_admin.name as created_by_admin_name, created_admin.nickname as created_by_admin_nickname, created_admin.email as created_by_admin_email, created_admin.name as admin_name, created_admin.nickname as admin_nickname, created_admin.email as admin_email, notice.updated_by_admin_id, notice.created_at, notice.updated_at, notice.deleted_at from notices_tbl notice left join members created_admin on created_admin.member_id = notice.created_by_admin_id where notice.deleted_at is null and notice.created_at >= date_sub(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), interval 7 day) order by notice.created_at desc, notice.notice_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into notices_tbl ( title, content, notice_type, created_by_admin_id, updated_by_admin_id, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{title}, #{content}, #{noticeType}, #{adminId}, #{adminId}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') )
mapper.update: update notices_tbl set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, notice_type = #{noticeType}, updated_by_admin_id = #{adminId}, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where notice_id = #{noticeId} and deleted_at is null

update notices_tbl set updated_by_admin_id = #{adminId}, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), deleted_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where notice_id = #{noticeId} and deleted_at is null
